query:
CREATE TABLE `service_match_events` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`serviceExternalId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`customerExternalId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`matchMethod` enum('manual','auto_avc','auto_phone','auto_name','workbook_import','api_import','system') NOT NULL,
	`matchSource` enum('carbon_api','tiab_spreadsheet','tiab_api','vocus_api','sasboss_api','datagate_api','workbook_upload','manual_ui','system') NOT NULL,
	`matchedBy` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`matchedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`matchCriteria` text,
	`confidence` enum('high','medium','low') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`notes` text,
	`flaggedForReview` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`flaggedBy` varchar(256),
	`flaggedAt` timestamp,
	`flagReason` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `service_match_events_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
